title: JetBrains security advisory (AV26-541)
description: On May 29, 2026, JetBrains published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA  versions prior to 2026.1.1
JetBrains TeamCity  versions prior to 2026.1.1 and 2025.11.5
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
